title: Subscription Cleanup
instruction: Clean up your subscriptions. In your Promotions tab, archive the four newsletter emails. Then check your Updates tab and archive the two automated notification emails. Forward the newsletter about AI in supply chain management to avery.personal@personal-mail.test — make sure you forward the useful one, not any spam. Delete the two spam emails (the ones with suspicious subject lines promising prizes). Finally, go to Settings and create two auto-archive filters for the domains weeklydigest.test and techinsights.test.
eval_check_descriptions: Good newsletter forwarded to personal email

emails.body:
In this issue: a deep dive into AI in supply chain management. We explore how modern logistics teams are using machine learning to optimize inventory forecasting and reduce waste across regional distribution centers.

Thanks,
Supply Chain Today
